home.welcomeDescription: Skyblur is a content warning and spoilers protection tool for Bluesky.

001.title: Post contents from Skyblur
001.description: If you want to post with blur, please post from Skyblur. Enclose the parts you want to blur with [secret]. When posted from Skyblur, it will automatically be posted to Bluesky.

002.title: Bluesky shows the blurred text
002.description: The parts enclosed with [secret] will be blurred as ******. Tap the embed to read the unblurred text on Skyblur.

003.title: Skyblur shows the unblurred text
003.description: The unblurred text will be displayed. If you want to delete a post, you can it from Skyblur.

heroDemo.blurDescription: Wrap text in [] to blur it.

home.featuresLink: See how visibility and masking work
home.recommendedClients: These clients make Skyblur posts easy to read across web and mobile.
home.inAuthProgress: Redirecting to authorization screen if necessary...

timeout.title: Session check is taking longer than expected
timeout.message: Please reload this page in one minute.

common.title: Skyblur
common.oGDescription: An AT Protocol compatible application for posting spoiler content on Bluesky.
common.systemError: System error. Please try again later.

menu.logoutDescription: Please choose how you would like to logout.
menu.logoutSoftDescription: Clears login info on this browser only.
menu.logoutHardDescription: Terminates the authentication session on the server.

login.title: Please enter your handle and tap login.
login.didResolve: Redirecting to authorization screen if necessary
login.redirectFailed: Failed to redirect to the authorization page.
login.tapToLinkProfile: Tap here to check if your account is displayed.
login.withAt: Please do not include the "@" in the handle.
login.backOperation: The back button was used on the authentication screen
login.subTitle: Login with atproto account
login.cannotUseWhiteSpace: Handles cannot contain whitespace (spaces, line breaks, or tabs).
login.cannotUseUnderscore: Bluesky handles do not contain underscores. Please check your input.
login.invalidCharacter: Bluesky handles can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and dots. Please check your input.
login.handleCannotEndWithDot: Handles cannot end with a dot.
login.handleMaybeTypo: This may be a typo for "{1}". Please check your handle.

createPost.postSimpleModeDescription: The second line and beyond will be automatically blurred.
createPost.postComplexDescription: Please enclose the parts you want to blur with []. Please select the text you want to blur and use the button.
createPost.simpleMode: Simple Mode (switching will erase the content)
createPost.preview: Preview of the post that will be published on Bluesky
createPost.previewDescription: A link to Skyblur will be automatically inserted.
createPost.previewPlaceHolder: This will be automatically set when you enter content.
createPost.additionalDescription: This will not be reflected on Bluesky and will only be visible on Skyblur.
createPost.createDescription: Press the button below to post if you're ready.
createPost.oGPDescriptionPassword: [A password is required to view this posts]
createPost.selectTextForBrackets: Select the text you want to hide.
createPost.errorDuplicateBranket: A closing ] is missing. Please add ].
createPost.bracketFromFullToHalf: Convert Full-width Brackets to Half-width Brackets
createPost.bracketsUnbalanced: The brackets are not correct. The number of [ and ] do not match.
createPost.isPrevBlurLoading: Retrieving the content of the previous post.
createPost.restoreTitle: Would you like to restore the content you entered halfway?
createPost.publishMethodDescription: Choose who can read the full text and additional info on Skyblur.

public.label: Public
public.description: Anyone on Bluesky can see it.

login.label: Login
login.description: The viewer's must login to Skyblur. It cannot be accessed by people who do not have a Bluesky account.

password.label: Password
password.description: Only users who know the password can view

followers.label: Followers only
followers.description: Only users who follow you can view (Login required)

following.label: Following only
following.description: Only users you follow can view (Login required)

mutual.label: Mutuals only
mutual.description: Only mutual followers can view (Login required)

list.label: List only
list.description: Only accounts in the selected Bluesky list can view (Login required)

createPost.listPickerEmpty: No lists owned by this account were found.
createPost.listPickerRetrying: Fetching is taking longer than expected. Retrying automatically.
createPost.listPickerRequired: Select the list that can view this post.
createPost.threadGateDescription: You can restrict replies and quotes to this post (effective on Bluesky only).
createPost.passwordInputDescription: This will be created as a password post. You cannot change this setting after posting. If you forget the password, you will no longer be able to view the full text or edit it.
createPost.passwordErrorSpace: Spaces are not allowed in the password.
createPost.changeSimpleModeDescription: Do you want to switch modes? Switching will discard your current input.
createPost.confirmBackDescription: Your changes will not be saved. Are you sure you want to go back?
createPost.notBracketInSimpleMode: You cannot use [] in Simple Mode
createPost.visibilityDetailedInfoBody:
- Post Content: Only the blurred parts are visible to specified users (unblurred parts are public).
- Additional Info: The entire content is visible only to specified users.

Please use them according to the importance and purpose of your information!

localeSwitchWarningDescription: Unsaved composer input may be lost if the screen is reloaded in another language.

deleteList.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
deleteList.encryptDescription: This post is password protected. To view the unblurred text and additional, please enter the password and click 'Unlock'.

replyList.replyLabelDescription: Please check when replying to your own specific post.
replyList.searchTakingLong: Fetching is taking longer than expected. Retrying automatically.

pref.title: Settings
pref.myPagePublishDescription: When you publish the My Page, your Skyblur posts list will be accessible by other user on Skyblur site.
pref.customFeedPublishDescription: When you publish the Custom Feed, your Skyblur posts will be shown as Bluesky Custom Feed.
pref.fileType: File accepts jpg or png images

post.decryptError: Failed to unlock. Please check your password.
post.restricted_NotAuthorized: You do not have permission to view this post.
post.restricted_LoginRequired: Please log in to view this post.
post.restricted_NotAuthorized_Followers: You do not have permission to view this post (Followers only).
post.restricted_NotAuthorized_Following: You do not have permission to view this post (Following only).
post.restricted_NotAuthorized_Mutual: You do not have permission to view this post (Mutuals only).
post.restricted_NotAuthorized_List: This post is limited to a selected list, or permission could not be confirmed.
post.restricted_ListCheckFailed: List visibility could not be confirmed. Please try again later.

scopeRelogin.title: Login permissions need to be updated
scopeRelogin.message: Skyblur has added a new feature. Press Log in again on the right to start using it.

postComposer.detailsSummary: Reply controls, quote settings, and reply target
postComposer.replyControlDescription: Choose who can reply to this post on Bluesky.
postComposer.replyTargetDescription: Use this when posting as a reply to another post.
postComposer.quoteSettingDescription: Choose whether this post can be quoted on Bluesky.
postComposer.bracketHelp: Select text and wrap it in []: Bluesky shows it hidden, Skyblur shows it unhidden.
postComposer.errorListRequired: Select the list that can view this post.
postComposer.errorUnsupportedStorageChange: This visibility change is not supported while editing yet. Recreate the post if you need this change.
postComposer.errorSaveFailed: Could not save. Please try again later.
postComposer.errorEncryptFailed: Encryption failed. The text, additional text, and password are still kept. Try again.
postComposer.errorBlobUploadFailed: Could not upload the encrypted data. The post has not been created yet. Try again.
postComposer.errorRestrictedStoreFailed: Could not save the restricted full text. The text and additional text are still on this screen. Try again.
postComposer.errorApplyWritesFailed: Could not save the post records. The save is not complete. Try again.
postComposer.errorUnauthorized: The required save permission could not be confirmed. Log in again and try once more.
postComposer.errorConflict: The post conflicted with another update. Check the latest content and try again.
postComposer.errorGateSavePartial: The text and additional text were saved, but reply and quote settings could not be saved. Check those settings and try again.
postComposer.warningRestrictedCleanupFailed: The post was saved, but previous restricted data may still remain. Check again later.
postComposer.gateControlsUnavailable: Reply and quote settings could not be checked, so they cannot be changed in this edit. Text and additional text can still be saved.
postComposer.restoreReplyFailed: The reply target could not be restored. Text, additional text, and visibility can still be restored.
postComposer.loadErrorNeedLogin: Log in to edit this post.
postComposer.loadErrorDifferentAccount: This post cannot be edited from the currently logged-in account.
postComposer.loadErrorRecordFailed: Could not load the post for editing.
postComposer.loadErrorUnsupportedRecord: This post format cannot be edited.
postComposer.loadErrorPasswordDataMissing: Could not find the encrypted data for this password post.
postComposer.loadErrorRestrictedContentFailed: Could not load the restricted post body.
postComposer.passwordUnlockDescription: Enter the original password to reveal and edit the post body.
postComposer.passwordUnlockDataMissing: Could not find the encrypted data.
postComposer.checkFixRequired: Some items need attention before posting.

readyDecision.title: Review before posting
readyDecision.description: Review the Bluesky post and the Skyblur text separately before posting.

ready.title: Skyblur Check
ready.description: Review what Skyblur reveals, what appears on Bluesky, and the audience settings before posting.

postComposer.checkFixDescription: Some items need to be fixed before posting. Go back to the relevant step to update them.
postComposer.checkReloginDescription: This post needs permissions that are missing. You can post after logging in again.
postComposer.checkAudienceTitle: Who can read the full text on Skyblur
postComposer.checkReadableBy: Who can read the full text
postComposer.checkEditBlueskyNotUpdated: The already-published Bluesky text and card will not change in this update.
postComposer.checkUnreadableFullText: The full text and additional text are shown.
postComposer.checkUnreadableLoginRequired: A Skyblur login-required message is shown.
postComposer.writeTargetCreateBlueskyPost: Post the masked text to Bluesky
postComposer.audienceOutcomePublicBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomePublicSkyblur: Everyone can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeLoginBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeLoginSkyblur: Only people logged in to Skyblur can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.audienceOutcomePasswordBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomePasswordSkyblur: Only people who know the password can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeFollowersBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeFollowersSkyblur: Only people logged in to Skyblur who follow you can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeFollowingBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeFollowingSkyblur: Only people logged in to Skyblur who you follow can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeMutualBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeMutualSkyblur: Only mutual followers logged in to Skyblur can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeListBluesky: Only the masked text is displayed.
postComposer.audienceOutcomeListSkyblur: Only people logged in to Skyblur who are in the selected list can read the full text and additional text.
postComposer.routeCreatePreparing: The dedicated composer is being prepared. For now, use the existing composer from /console.
postComposer.routeEditLoaded: The post was loaded. The composer body and save flow will be connected in the following tasks.
